card.flavor_text:
"Learn to let her go, or you cannot let the pure cosmic energy flow in from the universe."
—Guru Pathik
card.name: Abandon Attachments
card.oracle_text: You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards.

card.flavor_text:
"To prove your worth as scholars, you have to contribute some worthwhile knowledge."
—Wan Shi Tong
card.name: Accumulate Wisdom
card.oracle_text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of those cards into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Put each of those cards into your hand instead if there are three or more Lesson cards in your graveyard.

card.flavor_text:
"Sokka, watch out! It's Sparky-Sparky Boom Man!"
—Aang
card.name: Combustion Technique
card.oracle_text: Combustion Technique deals damage equal to 2 plus the number of Lesson cards in your graveyard to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.flavor_text:
"Firebending is not something to fear, but if you don't respect it, it'll chew you up and spit you out."
—Zuko
card.name: Firebending Lesson
card.oracle_text:
Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.)
Firebending Lesson deals 2 damage to target creature. If this spell was kicked, it deals 5 damage to that creature instead.

card.flavor_text: Quintorius found that every new discovery motivated him to keep exploring.
card.name: Flashback
card.oracle_text: Target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost. (You may cast that card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.flavor_text: "It's been so long since I've had hope, but you brought it back to life."
card.name: Gran-Gran
card.oracle_text:
Whenever Gran-Gran becomes tapped, draw a card, then discard a card.
Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast as long as there are three or more Lesson cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Great Hall of the Biblioplex
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell.
{5}: If this land isn't a creature, it becomes a 2/4 Wizard creature with "Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn." It's still a land.

card.flavor_text: The merrow was vending her wares when the skies darkened, then she sharply raised her prices.
card.name: Hallowed Fountain
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {W} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.flavor_text: "Did I ever tell you how I got the nickname 'The Dragon of the West?'"
card.name: Iroh's Demonstration
card.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Iroh's Demonstration deals 1 damage to each creature your opponents control.
• Iroh's Demonstration deals 4 damage to target creature.

card.flavor_text: "Drink cactus juice. Nothing's quenchier. It's the quenchiest!"
card.name: It'll Quench Ya!
card.oracle_text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.flavor_text:
"No one of us could have built all this alone. A clan, a school, hope for the future. Thank you all."
—Narset, to Shiko, Taigam, and Elsha
card.name: Jeskai Revelation
card.oracle_text: Return target spell or permanent to its owner's hand. Jeskai Revelation deals 4 damage to any target. Create two 1/1 white Monk creature tokens with prowess. Draw two cards. You gain 4 life.

card.flavor_text: Built on a fumarole field, the village is a refuge of warmth amid the ice of the Qal Sisma mountains.
card.name: Mistrise Village
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain or a Forest.
{T}: Add {U}.
{U}, {T}: The next spell you cast this turn can't be countered.

card.flavor_text:
"While Loot's ability to predict Omenpaths is extraordinary, I'm more impressed by his unrelenting curiosity."
—Pia Nalaar
card.name: Riverpyre Verge
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {R}.
{T}: Add {U}. Activate only if you control an Island or a Mountain.

card.name: Spirebluff Canal
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.flavor_text: The flamekin was drawn toward warm laughter when the skies darkened, then she turned back to the lonely peak.
card.name: Steam Vents
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {R}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.flavor_text: "We are now accepting over eleven different interplanar currencies, including polished moonfall!"
card.name: Stock Up
card.oracle_text: Look at the top five cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.flavor_text:
"Study of the past is preparation for the future. My fail-safe spell, activated upon my death, was precaution born from tales of the careless."
—Augusta, dean of order
card.name: Sundown Pass
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands.
{T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.flavor_text: Leaving no stone unturned is just the beginning.
card.name: Tablet of Discovery
card.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, mill a card. You may play that card this turn. (To mill a card, put the top card of your library into your graveyard.)
{T}: Add {R}.
{T}: Add {R}{R}. Spend this mana only to cast instant and sorcery spells.

card.flavor_text: She'd planned for every eventuality, with the obvious exception of failure.
card.name: Three Steps Ahead
card.oracle_text:
Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.)
+ {1}{U} — Counter target spell.
+ {3} — Create a token that's a copy of target artifact or creature you control.
+ {2} — Draw two cards, then discard a card.

review.basis: Pinned 60-card main deck reviewed against card rules text.
